title: Senior Full Stack Developer - AI
company_focus: IT services and digital solutions provider
description:
Expert knowledge in Python programming language; experience
with web/RESTful responses and frameworks (Django or Flask).
• Commendable experience in Fast API development. •
Experience in AWS cloud services like SQS, Lambda, etc. •
Experience in Kafka. • Experience in Prompt engineering
(system prompts & user prompts). • Proven experience in AI-
driven development using GitHub Co-pilot, Cursor, etc. •
Experience with front-end React JS, Angular JS and
integration areas / Backend – Mongo DB. • Good understanding
of application performance tuning and resource usage. •
Ability to troubleshoot existing scripts and do point bug
fixes / application redesign. • In-depth understanding of
the entire web development process (Object Oriented
programming, design patterns, development, and deployment).
• Good knowledge in DevOps practices, CI/CD is required. •
Experience in Agile and Scrum methodologies. • Knowledge of
project and task tracking tools such as Jira, Git. • Strong
communication and teamworking skills.

Responsibilities

Back-End Development: Design, build, and maintain efficient,
reusable, and reliable code for our server-side applications
using Python and Fast API. • Fast API & Cloud Integration:
Develop high-performance APIs with Fast API, integrating
with AWS cloud services such as SQS and Lambda. • Front-End
Development: Build engaging and responsive user interfaces
using front-end technologies including React JS and Angular
JS. • Database Management: Manage and optimize data storage
solutions using MongoDB. • AI Integration & Prompt
Engineering: Utilize experience in prompt engineering
(system prompts & user prompts) and AI-driven development
tools like GitHub Co-pilot and Cursor to enhance development
efficiency and integrate AI features into applications. •
System Architecture & DevOps knowledge: In-depth
understanding of the entire web development process (Object
Oriented programming, design patterns, development, and
deployment) and DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines.
• Performance & Troubleshooting: Troubleshoot existing
scripts, perform point bug fixes, and conduct application
performance tuning and resource usage optimization. •
Collaboration & Agile Methodologies: Collaborate with cross-
functional teams in an Agile and Scrum environment,
utilizing tools like Jira and Git for project and task
tracking.

Qualifications

• Good exposure to Gen AI tools and Agentic development
workflows. • Industry best practices with Security domain
knowledge
responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain efficient server-side applications using Python and FastAPI
Develop high-performance APIs with FastAPI, integrating with AWS cloud services such as SQS and Lambda
Build engaging and responsive user interfaces using React JS and Angular JS
Manage and optimize data storage solutions using MongoDB
Utilize prompt engineering and AI-driven development tools like GitHub Co-pilot and Cursor to enhance development efficiency and integrate AI features
Apply DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines for deployment
Troubleshoot existing scripts, perform bug fixes, and conduct application performance tuning
Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile and Scrum environment using Jira and Git
use_cases: AI-assisted software development using Co-pilot and Cursor
Prompt engineering for system and user prompts in applications
Integration of GenAI tools and agentic workflows into web applications
Full-stack web application development with AI-enhanced features
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is primarily a full-stack web developer role that
requires some AI-related skills (prompt engineering, Gen AI
tools) as supplementary competencies. The core
responsibilities are building web applications, APIs, and
managing databases using Python, FastAPI, React, and AWS. AI
tools like GitHub Co-pilot and Cursor are mentioned for
enhancing development efficiency, not for building or
deploying AI/ML models.
